intent: Single-screen high-density Cyber-Versicherung risk assessment with 27 interactive controls grouped into ISMS, backups, authentication, endpoint, network, awareness, testing, response and data-protection plus inline tooltip-only context, two computed quotes and a vollstaendigkeitserklaerung gate.
notes: Tier-3 insurance adversarial (high-density, tooltip-driven cross-modal): 27 mandatory controls plus four optional inputs stress technique-coverage breadth and force the harness to choose between exhaustive enumeration and risk-based sampling. Two INFORMATIVE_LABELs (Tooltip EDR, Tooltip SOC) carry definitions that the rendered design conveys only as tooltips on hover; cross-modal faithfulness must surface them in any negative path that questions whether plain antivirus or an unmonitored SIEM satisfies the question. Two RESULT_DISPLAYs encode quotes whose formula spans most of the form.
